childhood.familyBackground: Grew up in a family with pharmaceutical industry connections. Parents were healthcare professionals.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 제약 산업과의 연결이 있는 가족에서 성장. 부모는 의료 전문가였음.
childhood.earlyLife: Started career in pharmaceutical research before transitioning to healthcare business.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 제약 연구로 경력을 시작한 후 의료 사업 개발로 전환.

failures.description: FDA regulatory challenges for pharmaceutical products
failures.lesson: Importance of understanding international regulatory environments

personalTraits.knownFor: Innovation in pharmaceutical manufacturing and commitment to healthcare accessibility
personalTraits.knownForKo: 제약 제조의 혁신 및 의료 접근성에 대한 약속

personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 중국 시골 지역의 의료 개발 프로그램
